description: Real-time and forecasted wave heights and periods.
General ocean parameters including currents and temperatures.
Early warning and advisories for seismic sea waves.
Advisories on coastal water rises due to atmospheric disturbances.
Trajectory and impact assessment of marine oil pollution.
Drift forecasts to assist maritime search and rescue operations.
Monitoring and alerts for sea surface temperature bleaching risks.
Potential Fishing Zones (PFZ) advisory for fishermen.
Advanced storm surge modeling and prediction alerts.
